title: Xysmalobium marginatum
taxonomy: Xysmalobium marginatum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to tropical Africa. The plant is further categorized into the genus Xysmalobium and is a type of milkweed vine. The Xysmalobium genus is also known as the 'twisted milkweed' and is characterized by its unique twisted and twisted-branching stems. The plant's classification is part of the larger Apocynaceae family, which includes over 5,000 species of plants.
